title: T1 Engine: promote refuses re-injecting a done ticket without --force
prompt: Read and execute the war game at backlog/wargames/T1-18-promote-refuses-done.md move by move. Make bin/promote-wargame.py refuse a ticket already in done/ unless --force (the done set is already computed by state_sets); on failure apply the counter-move; on abort write needs-decision/. Run the Verification block yourself before self-reporting.
verify: promote-wargame.py parses; promoting a done ticket exits non-zero with 'already in done' and does NOT copy into queue/; --force still promotes; a fresh ticket still promotes.
